description: Extracts the Bill of Materials from an Inventor assembly (.iam zipped) to result.json. Each row contains partNumber, description, quantity, material, and mass.

inputFile.description: Zipped Inventor assembly (.zip) — must contain the root .iam at its top level or pointed to by pathInZip

resultJson.description: Extracted BOM as JSON array. Each element: { partNumber, description, quantity, material, mass, unit }
